title: Credible performance by Badgers Colts
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers Colts team had a good weekend in their last round of matches in the Cricket SA Colts competition against the Eastern Cape in Oudtshoorn.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The Garden Route Badgers Colts team had a good weekend in their last round of matches in the Cricket SA Colts competition against the Eastern Cape in Oudtshoorn."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"They recorded a credible draw in the three-day match. The heroes were Warren Bell, who struck a century 101, and the spin bowler, Enathi Kitshini, with figures of 7/47 and 4/95, who bagged 11 wickets in the match."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In the one-day match, the home side posted 295/6 in their allotted 50 overs and dismissed the Iinyathi for 152 for a comprehensive 143 runs victory.","html":"In the one-day match, the home side posted 295/6 in their allotted 50 overs and dismissed the Iinyathi for 152 for a comprehensive 143 runs victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The summarised scorecards are:","html":"The summarised scorecards are:"},{"type":"list","items":["Three Day match"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 1st innings 276 all out (Keeran Forbes 86, Russel Peters 41, Thozama Totana 52, Grant Esau 2/36, Enathi Kitshini 7/47)","html":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 1st innings 276 all out (Keeran Forbes 86, Russel Peters 41, Thozama Totana 52, Grant Esau 2/36, Enathi Kitshini 7/47)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 1st innings 276 all out (Warren Bell 101, Pheko Moletsane 49, Thurstin Murphy 46, Regan Rhode 39, Bradley Plaatjies 23, Siphisihle Ntuntwana 2/49, Marius Fourie 2/48, Akhona Ratyana 2/62)","html":"SWD GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 1st innings 276 all out (Warren Bell 101, Pheko Moletsane 49, Thurstin Murphy 46, Regan Rhode 39, Bradley Plaatjies 23, Siphisihle Ntuntwana 2/49, Marius Fourie 2/48, Akhona Ratyana 2/62)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 2nd innings 240/8 (Keeran Forbes 37, Russel Peters 54, Olwakhe Gogoza 48, Matthew Fourie 53, Enathi Kitshini 4/95, Reagan Rhode 3/58) Match drawn.","html":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 2nd innings 240/8 (Keeran Forbes 37, Russel Peters 54, Olwakhe Gogoza 48, Matthew Fourie 53, Enathi Kitshini 4/95, Reagan Rhode 3/58) Match drawn."},{"type":"list","items":["One Day match"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 295/8 (50 overs) (Mark Adrianatos 60, Breyton Plaatjies 46, Hayden Sweet 35, Pheko Moletsane 82, Anoxolo Khitshini 23*","html":"SWD GARDEN ROUTE BADGERS COLTS 295/8 (50 overs) (Mark Adrianatos 60, Breyton Plaatjies 46, Hayden Sweet 35, Pheko Moletsane 82, Anoxolo Khitshini 23*"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 152 all out (29 overs) (Keeran Forbes 70, B Mfazwe 41, Stefan May 4/47, Enathi Khitshini 3/26)","html":"EASTERN CAPE IIANYATHI 152 all out (29 overs) (Keeran Forbes 70, B Mfazwe 41, Stefan May 4/47, Enathi Khitshini 3/26)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"SWD Garden Route Badgers Colts won by 143 runs.","html":"SWD Garden Route Badgers Colts won by 143 runs."}]
